stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
During the approach, the pilot retracts the flaps. Due to a malfunction, the flaps are retracted as in the figure. How should the pilot react?

options.a: Roll to the right and left rudder.
options.b: Roll to the left and right rudder.
options.c: Roll to the right and right rudder.
options.d: Roll to the left and left rudder.
